domain: Polynesian Hōkūleʻa wayfinding (62-ft voyaging canoe Hokule'a tradition; 12-person crew functions as compass without instruments; Hawaiian Star Compass with 32 houses × 11.25°; crew sub-roles watch-keeper/star-tracker/swell-reader/wind-reader; distributed multi-cue observation + consensus course; oral master-apprentice transmission Mau Piailug → Nainoa Thompson)
specific_mechanism: HOKULEA-CREW: distributed multi-cue multi-agent consensus coordinator. (1) N agents A_1...A_N each specializing in a distinct observation cue (factual, ethical, retrieval, format, refusal, tone, multi-hop, style). (2) Each agent emits structured *bearing report* (cue_id, confidence, vote_value) per round. (3) Helmsman aggregator (lightweight model) maps reports into a discrete 32-house consensus heading; conflicting bearings >threshold trigger 'watch-change' (replace dissenting agent with deputy). (4) Apprentice agent (small LLM) imitates master's bearing-distillation behavior — distillation channel for capability transmission. (5) Shared crew state (current heading + recent bearings) on a small blackboard; no instrumental retrieval — each agent uses only its specialty.
llm_application: HOKULEA-CREW for multi-agent LLM coordination: distributed specialist agents emit bearing-reports, 32-house aggregator yields consensus heading, watch-change resolves conflicts, apprentice distillation. Differs from Multi-Agent Survey 2501.06322 (broadcast/relay/report networks + blackboards — but no 32-house discrete consensus + watch-change). Self-Organizing Agents 2603.28990 (self-organizing structure — not 32-house compass aggregator). AgentNet (decentralized RAG capability evolution — no bearing-report 32-house structure). Provable Coordination 2604.17612 (Message Sequence Charts — provable coordination but no discrete consensus heading). Differs from R392 MAASAI-ILPAYIANI, R411 IROQUOIS-CONDOLENCE, R403 WELSH-PENILLION, R443 ALUNA-COUNCIL (multi-elder hazard council weighted-consensus + flag-veto — close but different aggregator topology), R449 MAPUCHE-PURRUN (primero-improviser segundo-timer drum-pair) by EXPLICIT 32-HOUSE DISCRETE BEARING AGGREGATOR + WATCH-CHANGE CONFLICT-TRIGGER + APPRENTICE DISTILLATION.
novelty_claim: Multi-Agent Survey + Self-Organizing + AgentNet + Provable Coordination cover distributed multi-agent consensus paradigm. HOKULEA-CREW adds (a) 32-house discrete consensus heading aggregator + (b) watch-change conflict-triggered agent replacement + (c) apprentice-distilled bearing model. Recombination — blackboard + voting + distillation are mainstream.
